articles.title: After Quad foreign ministers’ meet, why are questions being raised about the leaders’ summit?
articles.description: The foreign ministers of India, the US, Australia and Japan — S Jaishankar, Marco Rubio, Penny Wong and Toshimitsu Motegi — met in New Delhi for the Quad summit, and announced five major initiatives. However, it has been noted that New Delhi won’t host the Quad Leaders’ Summit. What’s going on?

articles.title: Quad backs free Indo-Pacific, flags South China Sea concerns: 'We oppose destabilising actions'
articles.description: The Quad nations on Tuesday strongly backed a free and open Indo-Pacific. Without naming China directly, the grouping unveiled new maritime surveillance initiatives while warning against attempts to alter the regional status quo by force.

articles.title: 'IRAN WON'T BEND, STOP DREAMING!': U.S. Diplomat's Brutal Reality Check To Trump | WATCH
articles.description: As Donald Trump's plan to exert maximum pressure on Iran to push it toward a peace deal is yet to find any success, a former US envoy has somewhat given a reality check to the US President on the stalement. Robert Malley, who serve as Joe Biden's special envoy to Iran, argued that Washington fundamentally misunderstood Iran by believing extreme pressure could force the country to abandon what it sees as a core national principle and sovereign right. Malley said Iran’s leadership feared being “tricked again” after past negotiations and stressed that national dignity and political values cannot simply be crushed through economic hardship or force. He compared the issue to how the United States would react if pressured to surrender values it considered sacred.#DonaldTrump #Iran #RobertMalley #USIranWar #MiddleEastWar #MiddleEastconflict #NuclearDeal #IranNuclearProgram #Geopolitics #USPolitics #BreakingNews

‘Prayers, not explosions’: How Muslims have embarked on Haj amid the Middle East crisis
articles.description: According to Iran’s IRNA state news agency, only a little over 30,000 Iranian pilgrims made the journey to Saudi Arabia this year due to the “wartime situation”, far below the expected 86,700 participants.

articles.title: Ranveer Singh offers prayers at Mysuru’s Chamundeshwari Temple following ‘Kantara’ mimicry case
articles.description: Ranveer Singh visited Mysuru’s Chamundeshwari Temple weeks after the Karnataka High Court directed him to offer prayers in connection with the ‘Kantara’ mimicry row.

articles.title: Japan tightens rules for foreign children's residence cards from June 14
articles.description: From June 14, country will require facial photographs for all foreign children applying for or renewing residence cards

articles.title: Amid 'Don 3' row, Ranveer Singh seeks blessings at Chamundeshwari Temple as 'Kantara' mimicry case CLOSED
articles.description: Ranveer Singh quietly visited Chamundeshwari Temple on Tuesday morning, a day after FWICE announced a non-cooperation directive over his 'Don 3' exit. Wearing a mask, he spent 10 minutes praying before being recognised. Singh's spokesperson cited "dignity, maturity and mutual respect" as reasons for his silence on the controversy.

articles.title: How Russia’s Kh-101 missile uses decoy flares to slip past air defence shields
articles.description: Russia is upgrading its Kh-101 cruise missiles with advanced countermeasures to counter Ukraine's air defences. Recent footage shows these missiles deploying flares and potentially radar-confusing chaff. Despite these efforts, Ukraine claims high interception rates, though Russia's hypersonic missiles like Oreshnik pose a greater future threat.

articles.title: Director of Venezuela ‘torture’ prison, Elvis Macuare Guerrero, fired after riot
articles.description: Venezuelan prison director Elvis Macuare Guerrero fired amid riots by inmates protesting torture and demanding humane treatment.

articles.title: Newlywed 'would be alive' had police not advised her to stay in the UK
articles.description: Four police officers are facing misconduct proceedings over their handling of domestic abuse allegations made by 24-year-old Harshita Brella.

articles.title: From Haryana to history: Indian-origin mother-son duo become mayors in UK
articles.description: A mother-son duo of Indian origin from Haryana have been elected mayors in the UK within a week, marking a historic milestone for their family and the Indian diaspora.

articles.title: XI GREENLIGHTS INVASION? China SURROUNDS Taiwan With Warships, Fighter Jets, Troops
articles.description: As fears of another full-scale U.S.-Iran war begin to ease, a new geopolitical storm may already be brewing in the Pacific. Taiwan has raised its military alert level after detecting a second Chinese “combat readiness patrol” near the island within a week, intensifying fears of a potential future conflict in the Taiwan Strait. Taipei says it scrambled fighter jets and deployed naval forces after detecting Chinese J-16 fighter jets, drones, warships, and surveillance aircraft operating around the island. Taiwan’s Ministry of National Defense claimed that several PLA aircraft crossed the sensitive median line and entered Taiwan’s ADIZ, further escalating tensions.

articles.title: Who Are Tushar Kumar And Parveen Rani? Indian-Origin Mother-Son Duo Elected As UK Mayors
articles.description: A family that moved from Haryana to the United Kingdom more than a decade ago is celebrating a rare political milestone after both mother and son were elected mayors within days of each other.

articles.title: Amid UP panchayat poll delay, gram pradhans’ tenure extended by six months
‘Destroy nuclear dust...’: Trump says Iran must hand over enriched uranium to US for destruction
articles.description: Donald Trump has drawn a “red line” over Iran’s enriched uranium amid ongoing ceasefire and diplomatic negotiations involving the US, Iran, and regional powers. In a Truth Social post, Trump said Iran’s “nuclear dust” should either be handed over to the United States for destruction or destroyed under international supervision at a mutually agreed location.

articles.title: Three Big Takeaways From Quad's Delhi Meet
articles.description: The Quad, comprising India, the US, Australia and Japan, has emerged as a key grouping largely focusing on peace, security and stability in the Indo-Pacific region.

articles.description: The order was passed in a petition filed by the Centre through standing counsel Ashish Dixit, challenging the single judge’s April 24 order

articles.title: Delhi HC to hear Gymkhana lawsuit against Centre`s eviction order today
articles.description: DGC member Vijay Khurana, whose plea has backing of nearly 500 members, sought an order restraining the Centre from “illegally determining" the club's perpetual leasehold rights and forcibly dispossessing it.

articles.title: Panipat and Palwal DCs among 6 IAS officers transferred in Haryana
articles.description: According to the posting and transfer orders chief secretary Anurag Rastogi has issued, Virender Kumar Dahiya, DC, Panipat, has been posted as special secretary (secretariat establishment) even as he will also continue to hold the additional charge of director (environment) and special secretary (environment, forests and wildlife).

articles.description: Visit comes 10 days after Madhya Pradesh High Court ruling on disputed complex recognised it as Hindu temple

articles.title: Husband claimed wife wasn't doing household work; HC orders him to pay Rs 20,000/month as wives not ‘deemed maids’
articles.description: The husband, a Chartered Accountant (CA) by profession, had in 2004 filed for a divorce on the ground of cruelty, claiming that “wife was not behaving properly; was not doing her household work; she was disobedient towards his parents; her behavior was rude; she was not able to cook; the wife caused him mental stress, all these acts amount to cruelty.”

articles.title: Russia Claims 1,135 Ukrainian Casualties In A Day As Vostok Units Seize Dobropasovo Corridor
articles.description: The frontline in eastern Ukraine is moving fast. Russia's Ministry of Defence has officially announced the capture of the settlement of Dobropasovo after units from Battlegroup East smashed through Ukrainian defensive lines. According to Moscow, Ukraine suffered a staggering 1,135 casualties in just 24 hours, alongside a massive loss of heavy armor and electronic warfare gear. Far behind the front lines, a relentless wave of Russian missile and drone strikes pounded Ukrainian military airfields, fuel depots, and drone boat factories across 142 separate locations. Watch the breakdown of this brutal escalation.#DobropasovoFalls #VostokBattlegroup #FrontlineBreakthrough #142TargetBlitz #DroneWarfare2026 #RussianMoD #MilitaryLogistics #BreakingNews

articles.title: Why the West’s report card on India deserves far more scrutiny
articles.description: The problem with many global indices is not that they criticise India, but that they often claim scientific objectivity while relying on deeply contestable assumptions

articles.title: Chinese proverb of the day: 'The first decision of a woman is the most intelligent and the last decision is...' life lessons on decision-making, human behavior and how emotions can change decisions over time
articles.description: Chinese proverb of the day: Human decisions are shaped by emotions, with initial instincts often being the clearest. However, prolonged emotional buildup, stress, and conflict can lead to dangerous, unbalanced choices. This proverb highlights how emotional shifts influence judgment over time, impacting relationships and life decisions.

articles.title: 'Netanyahu’s IRAN WAR GOALS different from US’: Gabbard drops bombshell at explosive House hearing
articles.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard revealed a striking distinction between U.S. and Israeli objectives in the Iran conflict during a House hearing. Gabbard stated that US President Donald Trump’s goals focus on dismantling Tehran’s military capabilities, while Israel aims at disabling the Iranian leadership.

articles.title: Palaniswami, M K Stalin allege 'horse trading' as three rebel AIADMK MLAs quit party, join TVK
articles.description: AIADMK Turmoil: Three MLAs resign and join TVK, spurring allegations of 'horse trading' in Tamil Nadu's political scene. This move potentially shifts assembly power dynamics, while dissent within AIADMK signals further defections.

articles.title: Russia Hails ‘Hero’ Troops Who Cracked Ukraine’s Defensive Wall | Watch
articles.description: Russia is signaling that its war machine is far from slowing down. Right after unleashing one of the largest combined air assaults of the war, Russian Defence Minister Andrei Belousov has made a surprise frontline visit to the Vostok Group of Forces. Meeting with senior field commanders and awarding combat medals, Belousov’s appearance projects absolute confidence as panic grips Western intelligence. Ukrainian analysts claim Russia may have debuted an RS-26 Rubezh intermediate-range ballistic missile—known as the "Oreshnik"—to smash through Kyiv’s air shield. Watch the breakdown of this dangerous new phase.
